title: How to define a UX Widget IncludeScript
breadcrumbs: How to define a UX Widget IncludeScript
text: How to define a UX Widget IncludeScript UX widgets (field, entity, and component) can specify IncludeScript for their script and declarations containers in the physical definition of the widget. The properties that can be added to the physical definitions of UX widgets are following: [Field UX widget] Explain this code {declarations = INCLIB:DECL_FLD_WIDGET} {script = INCLIB:SCRIPT_FLD_WIDGET} Copy DECL_FLD_WIDGET and SCRIPT_FLD_WIDGET contain the code fragments defined in the IncludeScript library INCLIB , which is included in the declarations and script containers, respectively, for the field object bound to this widget. [Entity UX widget] Explain this code {declarations = INCLIB:DECL_ENT_WIDGET} {collection_script = INCLIB:SCRIPT_COLL_WIDGET} {occurrence_script = INCLIB:SCRIPT_OCC_WIDGET} Copy DECL_ENT_WIDGET , SCRIPT_COLL_WIDGET , and SCRIPT_OCC_WIDGET contain the code fragments defined in the IncludeScript library INCLIB , which is included in the declarations, collection script, and occurrence script containers, respectively, for the entity object bound to this widget. [Component UX widget] Explain this code {declarations = INCLIB:DECL_COMP_WIDGET} {component_script = INCLIB:SCRIPT_COMP_WIDGET} Copy DECL_COMP_WIDGET and SCRIPT_COMP_WIDGET contain the code fragments defined in the IncludeScript library INCLIB , which is included in the declarations and component script containers, respectively, for the component bound to this widget. In case of an invalid IncludeScript reference that does not exist, the compiler generates a compilation error. The following examples show errors for invalid references across all widget types: Widget Type Invalid Reference Compilation Error Field INCLIB:INVALID_SCRIPT_FLD_WIDGET 1000 - Cannot find include script 'INCLIB:INVALID_SCRIPT_FLD_WIDGET' for widget 'customFieldWidget' in the widget definition configuration files. Entity INCLIB:INVALID_SCRIPT_ENT_WIDGET 1000 - Cannot find include script 'INCLIB:INVALID_SCRIPT_ENT_WIDGET' for widget 'customEntityWidget' in the widget definition configuration files. Component INCLIB:INVALID_SCRIPT_COMP_WIDGET 1000 - Cannot find include script 'INCLIB:INVALID_SCRIPT_COMP_WIDGET' for widget 'customComponentWidget' in the widget definition configuration files. Note: Invalid declaration references behave the same way as invalid IncludeScript references. The following example shows the equivalent error for a declaration . Widget Type Invalid Reference Compilation Error Any declarations:INVALID_DECL_REF 1000 - Cannot find include script 'declarations:INVALID_DECL_REF' for widget '<widget-name>' in the widget definition configuration files.
